1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.rest-api/blob/master/io-package.json).

3021.issue: [S3021] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 22 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5005.issue: [W5005] setTimeout found in "build/main.js", but no clearTimeout detected

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (src/lib/rest-api.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.rest-api/blob/master/io-package.json).

5507.issue: [E5507] missing size attributes [xs,xl] for number at admin/jsonConfig.json/items/mainTab/port

5510.issue: [E5510] responsive check: maximum issues reached, please fix reported ones and recheck

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.rest-api/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.rest-api/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
